name: massage-masalova
description: Next.js application with Stripe Checkout, Prisma, and PostgreSQL

SITE_URL.description: Public app URL, for example https://your-app.example.com

NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL.description: Public app URL exposed to the client

STRIPE_SECRET_KEY.description: Stripe secret key for Checkout Sessions and webhook handling

STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY.description: Stripe publishable key kept for client-side integrations and dashboard parity

ADMIN_EMAIL.description: Initial admin email used for seed/manual setup

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Initial admin password used for seed/manual setup
